title: UserState
description: The user's objective state: shared household facts + their current subscription lines. Feeds GET /api/state and is the state input to compare(). Facts here are asked once and imported by whichever vertical's rules need them.

persona.description: Display only; never read by the engine.

household.description: Shared cross-vertical facts, asked once, imported by the per-vertical rules.

carFinancing.description: GAP cover only makes sense on leased/financed.

homeOwnership.description: A tenant does not insure the building structure.

lineCount.description: household mobile SIMs; multiplies telco savings.

kind.description: Explicit line role. telco: fixed|mobile|tv_addon. energy: electricity|gas. insurance: legacy_dopolnilno|car_ao|car_kasko|car_gap|home_structure|home_contents|health_rider|life|travel|pet|accident|assistance. water: water. If null, the engine falls back to name-based inference.

attributes.description: Per-vertical current facts, e.g. mobile {dataGB}, tv_addon {packType}, health_rider {riderType}.
